steps.title: Read slope and intercept
steps.content: All four options are in $y = b + mx$ form. From the scatterplot, the line has a positive slope (rises left to right) and a positive $y$-intercept (crosses the $y$-axis above zero).

steps.title: Match signs
steps.content:
Positive intercept and positive slope: $y = 0.6 + 1.5x$.

B has negative slope; C has negative intercept; D has both negative.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
